'''âv-th-s''' ('''vathasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ubicate|ubicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ubicate|ubicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| vathasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vathasithi|vathasithi]] || [[word:vathasiji|vathasiji]] || [[word:vathasishi|vathasishi]] || [[word:vathasi|vathasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathasuthuth|vathasuthuth]] || [[word:vathasujuj|vathasujuj]] || [[word:vathasushush|vathasushush]] || [[word:vathas|vathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathasuthu|vathasuthu]] || [[word:vathasuju|vathasuju]] || [[word:vathasushu|vathasushu]] || [[word:vathasu|vathasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathasufuth|vathasufuth]] || [[word:vathasufuj|vathasufuj]] || [[word:vathasufush|vathasufush]] || [[word:vathasuf|vathasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vathasethe|vathasethe]] || [[word:vathaseje|vathaseje]] || [[word:vathaseshe|vathaseshe]] || [[word:vathase|vathase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathasothoth|vathasothoth]] || [[word:vathasojoj|vathasojoj]] || [[word:vathasoshosh|vathasoshosh]] || [[word:vathas|vathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathasotho|vathasotho]] || [[word:vathasojo|vathasojo]] || [[word:vathasosho|vathasosho]] || [[word:vathaso|vathaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathasofoth|vathasofoth]] || [[word:vathasofoj|vathasofoj]] || [[word:vathasofosh|vathasofosh]] || [[word:vathasof|vathasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vathasĂŠthĂŠ|vathasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vathasĂŠjĂŠ|vathasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vathasĂŠshĂŠ|vathasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vathasĂŠ|vathasĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathasathath|vathasathath]] || [[word:vathasajaj|vathasajaj]] || [[word:vathasashash|vathasashash]] || [[word:vathas|vathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathasatha|vathasatha]] || [[word:vathasaja|vathasaja]] || [[word:vathasasha|vathasasha]] || [[word:vathasa|vathasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathasafath|vathasafath]] || [[word:vathasafaj|vathasafaj]] || [[word:vathasafash|vathasafash]] || [[word:vathasaf|vathasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vathasasha|vathasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govathasasha|govathasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivathasasha|gokivathasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vathasnĂŒsha|vathasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govathasnknĂŒsha|govathasnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivathasnĂŒsha|gokivathasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vathashĂ«sha|vathashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govathasnkshĂ«sha|govathasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivathashĂ«sha|gokivathashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathasrosha|vathasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathasnkrosha|govathasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathasrosha|gokivathasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vathasmusha|vathasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govathasnkmusha|govathasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathasmusha|gokivathasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vathasherasha|vathasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govathasnksherasha|govathasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivathasherasha|gokivathasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vathasngasha|vathasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govathasnkngasha|govathasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivathasngasha|gokivathasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vathasyasha|vathasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govathasnkyasha|govathasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivathasyasha|gokivathasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vathasyamasha|vathasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govathasnkyamasha|govathasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivathasyamasha|gokivathasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vathasnĂŒshĂ«sha|vathasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govathasnknĂŒshĂ«sha|govathasnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivathasnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivathasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathasnĂŒrosha|vathasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathasnknĂŒrosha|govathasnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathasnĂŒrosha|gokivathasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathasnĂŒmusha|vathasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathasnknĂŒmusha|govathasnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathasnĂŒmusha|gokivathasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vathashĂ«nĂŒsha|vathashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govathasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govathasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivathashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivathashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathashĂ«rosha|vathashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathasnkshĂ«rosha|govathasnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathashĂ«rosha|gokivathashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathashĂ«musha|vathashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathasnkshĂ«musha|govathasnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathashĂ«musha|gokivathashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vathasronĂŒsha|vathasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govathasnkronĂŒsha|govathasnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivathasronĂŒsha|gokivathasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vathasroshĂ«sha|vathasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govathasnkroshĂ«sha|govathasnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivathasroshĂ«sha|gokivathasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathasromusha|vathasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathasnkromusha|govathasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathasromusha|gokivathasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vathasmunĂŒsha|vathasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govathasnkmunĂŒsha|govathasnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivathasmunĂŒsha|gokivathasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vathasmushĂ«sha|vathasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govathasnkmushĂ«sha|govathasnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivathasmushĂ«sha|gokivathasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathasmurosha|vathasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathasnkmurosha|govathasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathasmurosha|gokivathasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vathas|vathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠs|vĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovathas|hovathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠthĂŠs|hovĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovathas|hohovathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠthĂŠs|hohovĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvathas|nĂŒvathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠthĂŠs|nĂŒvĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvathas|nĂŒnĂŒvathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠthĂŠs|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvathas|nĂŻvathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠthĂŠs|nĂŻvĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvathas|nĂŻnĂŻvathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠthĂŠs|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvathas|luvathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠthĂŠs|luvĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvathas|luluvathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠthĂŠs|luluvĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livathas|livathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠthĂŠs|livĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivathas|lilivathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠthĂŠs|lilivĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovathas|kovathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠthĂŠs|kovĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovathas|kokovathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠthĂŠs|kokovĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevathas|kevathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠthĂŠs|kevĂŠthĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevathas|kekevathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠthĂŠs|kekevĂŠthĂŠs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
